description_pairs.source_description: Renders a status icon (CircleCheck, CircleXmark, CircleInfo) or a Loader spinner based on the status prop value. Defaults to 'info' icon when no status is provided.
description_pairs.data_description: A status indicator component that displays different icons based on the tool execution status. Shows a loader for loading state.

description_pairs.source_description: Wraps ToolHeader and ToolFooter inside a Card. Uses useToolMessage hook to manage expand/collapse state, header/footer actions, footer content, loader visibility, and waiting state. Body content is only shown when expanded. Footer is only rendered while in waiting state.
description_pairs.data_description: Complete tool message component with automatic expand/collapse functionality and status-based behavior

description_pairs.source_description: Renders localized 'cancelled' text for cancelled status, delegates to ToolIndicator for success/error/loading statuses, and renders nothing for waitingConfirmation/waitingSubmission or undefined status.
description_pairs.data_description: Component for displaying tool status with indicators and localized text

description_pairs.source_description: Renders a user chat message inside a MessageBalloon with optional Avatar, timestamp, and action buttons. Supports plain text or markdown rendering via MarkdownRenderer when format='markdown'.
